Next.js with Redis

Transform your Next.js applications with Redis as a state holder, enabling efficient state management, scalability, and real-time updates for an enhanced user experience.

### Learn More To learn more about Upstash and its services, check out the following resources: - [Documentation](https://docs.upstash.com) - [Website](https://upstash.com) - [Blog](https://upstash.com/blog) - [Console](https://console.upstash.com) - [Discord](https://upstash.com/discord)

UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL=""
UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN=""

# If you are using the Vercel & Upstash integration, you may use the following environment variables:
KV_REST_API_URL=""
KV_REST_API_TOKEN=""
